recommendations.brief: To increase its share of AI recommendations for secret scanning, HashiCorp Vault should emphasize its unique strengths in secure secret management and compliance with tailored messaging, highlighting its capabilities in detecting and managing sensitive information in version control systems. Creating targeted content that includes case studies, whitepapers, and integrations with popular CI/CD tools—alongside SEO-optimized resources that address common developer pain points in secret management—will position Vault as a go-to solution for secret scanning, increasing its visibility in relevant AI answer engines.

Position Terraform as an integral part of the policy as code framework by highlighting its ability to manage infrastructure alongside OPA's policy enforcement, emphasizing use cases where Terraform can enhance policy deployment and compliance. Create targeted content such as case studies, webinars, and documentation that showcase real-world scenarios where Terraform integrates seamlessly with policy management, while also leveraging SEO strategies to rank higher on relevant searches related to "policy as code" solutions. Collaborate with community influencers and engage in discussions to promote Terraform's capabilities in this space, thus increasing visibility and authority in conjunction with OPA.
